status.title: Quest Status
status.defaultDesc: Recruit is registered under a bounty hunter but has not yet completed the initiation requirements.
status.pendingDesc: Recruit has met time and gold payment requirements, and is awaiting Guild Officer verification.
status.failedDesc: Recruit did not meet requirements or bounty hunter violated the guild charter in securing the recruit.
status.lockedDesc: Recruit guild membership is sealed and no longer viable.
status.rejectedDesc: Membership has permanently failed to meet the requirements.
status.paidDesc: Bounty hunter has already received gold for this recruit's enlistment.

faqPage.title: Frequently Asked Quests
faqPage.q1: 1. What is your bounty commission structure?
faqPage.a1: We pay 100 gold coins flat commission per recruit, and this is one of the highest-paying bounty programs in the realm.
faqPage.q2: 2. How long does it take for a recruit to appear in my guild records?
faqPage.a2: It should appear immediately in the guild archives.
faqPage.q3: 3. I just secured a recruit. Where can I find them?
faqPage.a3_step2: On the lower right side you will see an option: View Bounty Hunter Page.
faqPage.a3_step3: Here you can see all your pending and approved bounties.
faqPage.q4: 4. I know a fellow adventurer who needs hosting. How do I earn a referral bounty?
faqPage.a4_step2: Scroll down to the base of the hall to see your bounty hunter link.
faqPage.a4_step3: Send this link to the adventurer who needs hosting.
faqPage.a4_step4: When they follow the link and commission an account with us, you earn a bounty.
faqPage.q5: 5. I've been accepted into the InterServer Hosting bounty program. Now what?
faqPage.a5_step1: Enter your bounty hunter account to access InterServer guild crests by clicking the Banners and Links tab.
faqPage.a5_step2: Choose the guild crest you would like to add to your territory.
faqPage.a5_step3: You will see rune codes on the right side of all crests; copy and paste this rune code to your territory.
faqPage.a5_step4: When someone follows that link and commissions a hosting account, you earn a bounty.
faqPage.q6: 6. Can I use paid spellcasting (PPC) to promote InterServer Hosting?
faqPage.a6_line1: Aye, but please do not bid on our guild name, variations of our guild name, misspellings, or any keyword containing a portion of it including InterServer, InterServer Hosting.
faqPage.a6_line2: Focus on keywords like fast hosting, PHP hosting, WordPress hosting.
faqPage.a6_line3: Please contact us if you need help brainstorming keywords.
faqPage.a6_line4: Make sure to add InterServer, InterServer Hosting, InterServer.net, InterServer web hosting as negative campaign keywords.
faqPage.q7: 7. I've secured a recruit. When do I receive my gold?
faqPage.a7_line1: After 90 days a valid recruit will change from status Default to Quest Pending.
faqPage.a7_line2: Once the quest is Pending the gold will be paid during the first 7 days of the moon.
faqPage.q8: 8. I have a pending recruit that did not receive gold payment.
faqPage.a8_line1: There may be a few reasons for this. Sometimes we need more time to validate a recruit.
faqPage.a8_line2: One easy thing to check is to ensure your gold transfer method is set.
faqPage.q9: 9. How long do my recruits/bounties remain pending until they are approved?
faqPage.q10: 10. Can I use my bounty link for self-referrals on accounts I'll use for personal quests?
faqPage.a10: Nay. Any contact with a resold account will result in automatic failure of the bounty.
faqPage.a11_intro: Dishonoured means the bounty has permanently failed.
faqPage.a11_reasons: Some reasons for this could be:
faqPage.a11_reason1: The recruit has already joined our guild in the past.
faqPage.a11_reason2: The same coin purse was used as another account.
faqPage.a11_reason3: The system detected that you, the bounty hunter, are also using the recruit's account.
faqPage.a11_policy: Since our payout of 100 gold coins per recruit is often far greater than we recover from the recruit even after 1 year, we have a strict policy to catch referrals that do not meet our guild charter. If you are referring a friend or a client, just give them a link or a discount rune. Do not share coin purse types and do not use the account.
faqPage.a11_reviewTos: Also please review our bounty hunter charter here:
faqPage.q12: 12. I am a craftsman/enchanter and will refer clients. Is that acceptable?
faqPage.a12_line1: This plan is not going to work with us (or any other hosting bounty program). Once matches are made across multiple accounts, the bounties fail.
faqPage.a12_line2: This is done to prevent the same adventurer from joining and profiting from our bounty program by referring themselves.
faqPage.a12_line3: You might want to consider hosting the clients directly and billing them yourself using something like PayPal. You can commission a reseller hosting account from us and begin your journey.
faqPage.q13: 13. Where can I set up my gold transfer method?
faqPage.a13: You can set up your gold transfer method,
